Üsküdar University Faculty of Communication Education Studio is located in the South Campus. Faculty of Communication Education Studio is an applied education area where students of the Faculty of Communication can use their theoretical knowledge in practice. The training studio is located in an area of approximately 200 square meters and is equipped with the necessary equipment for live broadcasting.

Activities carried out in the Faculty of Communication Education Studio

The Faculty of Communication Training Studio has been designed with modern equipment in order for our students to know the materials used in the sector in the future. With an audience capacity of 50 people, the studio offers an ideal environment for both training, live broadcasting and taped broadcasting. At the same time, the "School of Emotion with Prof. Dr. Nevzat TARHAN" program, which is broadcast on a national channel, is filmed in the studio and it is possible for all of Turkey to watch the program broadcast on a national channel. Our students have the opportunity to make their own broadcasting experiments in the Training Studio as well as to observe professionally made broadcasts.

Some of the courses taught in the Training Studio are as follows:

Television Programming I and II

Announcer and Diction Techniques

Thematic Broadcasting on Television

Lighting and Visual Techniques

Director of Photography

Music Video Production

Advanced Lighting Techniques

Digital Broadcasting Theory and Practice in Television

The Education Studio also teaches the students of our University, who will enter the sector, to understand how the studio tempo works and the ability to work with a studio team.

Technological Facilities at the Faculty of Communication Training Studio

The equipment in our Faculty of Communication Training Studio for television production is as follows:

4 Sony Z-190 Studio Cameras,

Tricaster semi-professional image selector,

Light Control Desk,

Prompter,

KJ computer

Playout system

In addition, there is also equipment suitable for the creation of high quality films such as Sony A7SII, Sony NX-3 cameras for short fiction and documentary films, lighting sets such as KinoFlo LED Panel, sound units such as Rode Boom Microphone for our students' outdoor shooting.
